nasb.text: Then Pharaoh said to him, “Get away from me! Beware, do not see my face again, for in the day you see my face you shall die!”

esv.text: Then Pharaoh said to him, “Get away from me; take care never to see my face again, for on the day you see my face you shall die.”

cnv.text: 法老對摩西說：“你離開我去吧，你要小心，不要再見我的面；因為你再見我面的時候，你必定死。”

ccb.text: 法老对摩西说：“给我滚出去！不要再让我见到你，因为你再见我面之日必死。”
